description: Load a saved SB3 model and evaluate it over N episodes with evaluate_policy, reporting mean and std episode reward.
rules: read-only with respect to remote/live services — only reads the model and writes under record_store
wraps the vendored evaluate_agent.py:evaluate_agent unchanged (PPO.load + DummyVecEnv + evaluate_policy)
MODEL_PATH must point to an SB3 .zip saved by the train perk (or any SB3 model.save)
needs stable-baselines3 >= 2.8 (Python 3.10+), gymnasium, and torch present to actually evaluate; degrades gracefully otherwise
usage: Set MODEL_PATH (saved .zip), ENV_ID (Gymnasium id), N_EVAL_EPISODES. Output: evaluation.json (mean/std reward + metadata).
limitation: Loads with the PPO class (matches the vendored template); other algorithm classes would need an edit. Heavy science libs and Python 3.10+ are required; without them the porter records the libs are absent and writes an empty-but-present report.
